introduction: SYNOPSISFarm boy Sal Mo-sa steals some radishes and is running away when he sees Sun-sim splitting woods and helps her. When he finds out that she is about to become former official Choi's mistress because of money, Mo-sa tries to get the money for her. Mo-sa wins the reward for catching a thief but he loses it when he succumbs to Wol-seon's seductions. Mo-sa wins a rice wine-drinking contest. He takes the money and goes to Choi but he wants interests on the money. Two kisaengs Hyang-sim and Wol-hyang fall for Mo-sa because he is so strong. When Mo-sa is getting beat up for conning some men, Hyang-sim and Wol-hyang save him. Mo-sa and Choi make a bet. Mo-sa wins but he turns down Sun-sim's hand in marriage and leaves.故事蛇仆是送人指法霜萝卜帮助sunsim柴打手。为了让知道她要救的，因为choejinsa妾钱生钱的事实。抓住一个黑色连帽蛇镜头赏金失去每月seonne诱惑钱。查找在加纳饮用黄酒竞赛中获得choejinsa奖金需要兴趣和寄生围绕整个世界螺柱wolhyang粉碎蝰蛇的电源来袭欺诈内部获得的蛇适合molmae。蛇赌赢和choejinsa是sunsim它拒绝了这一建议，并离开路面。
